prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a man in his late 30s seated in the open cockpit of an F-15E Strike Eagle on the tarmac, wearing a full USAF olive drab flight suit with squadron patches and G-suit leg panels, HGU-55/P flight helmet in matte grey with dark visor raised fully up, oxygen mask unclipped and hanging to the side. His face must exactly match the reference: short buzzed dark hair with subtle stubble on the scalp, very short dark stubble beard, brown eyes, olive Mediterranean skin tone, warm relaxed expression looking directly at camera. Shot with 85mm lens at f/2.0, ISO 200, bright afternoon sunlight from camera-right casting warm directional light across his face with a soft shadow on left cheek. Cockpit background shows authentic F-15E instrument panels, MFDs, throttle quadrant, glareshield, all slightly blurred with shallow depth of field. Realistic skin texture — visible pores, subtle sun-kissed skin, no smoothing. Do not alter his facial features. Do not change his hair or beard. Identity must match reference photograph exactly.
negative_prompt: different person, wrong face, bald head, full beard, smooth skin, plastic skin, airbrushed, beauty filter, CGI, 3D render, cartoon, visor down, closed visor, studio backdrop, body proportion averaging, anatomy normalization, symmetrical perfection, skin smoothing, watermark, text overlay
